startPoint.en: Sift through Nomad's memory on the western side of the lower level of the Underworld. (Return to the Underworld by passing through Death's door in Death's office.)
startPoint.es: Rebusca en la memoria de Nomad en el lado oeste del nivel inferior del Underworld. (Regresa al Underworld pasando por la puerta de Death en la oficina de Death.)

children.title: Complete the Knight Waves in Camelot

recommended.name: 'Chipped' Watchtower teleport
recommended.display: 'Chipped' Watchtower teleport, Ring of duelling or teleport runes to Ourania Runecrafting Altar

recommended.name: Wilderness sword
recommended.display: Wilderness sword for easy teleports to Edgeville

recommended.name: Ring of respawn
recommended.display: Ring of respawn for easy teleports to Soul Wars lobby

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal for teleport to east Varrock

rewards.display: Three experience lamps of 1,500 experience each.

text.en: Enter the River of Noumenon by passing through the door behind Death in Death's office.
text.es: Entra en el River of Noumenon pasando por la puerta detrás de Death en la oficina de Death.

text.en: Approach the Sinister figure on the west side at the bottom of the stairs, then sift through Nomad's memory.
text.es: Acércate a la Sinister figure en el lado oeste, al pie de las escaleras, y luego rebusca en la memoria de Nomad.

text.en: In each of the following locations, in order, "Sift through", "End" and then "Witness" the memory and receive the text saying where the next memory is.
text.es: En cada una de las siguientes ubicaciones, en orden, "Rebusca", "Termina" y luego "Presencia" el recuerdo y recibe el texto que indica dónde está el siguiente recuerdo.

text.en: Once there is text overlaid on your screen, you can click away and move on to the next memory
text.es: Una vez que aparezca texto superpuesto en tu pantalla, puedes hacer clic fuera y pasar al siguiente recuerdo.

rows: By the graves near the yew trees in Edgeville, south of the bank
West of Aubury's rune shop in Varrock, east of the Blue Moon Inn
At the Ourania altar, near the altar itself at the end of the tunnel
Nomad's throne room - use Edgeville portal to enter the Soul Wars lobby area. Enter tent to the east.
In Dragith Nurn's chamber at the end of the Lumbridge Catacombs
Near the small guard house just outside of the east gate in to Varrock
Between the two graveyards in the Soul Wars lobby
Nomad's throne room (again) - enter the tent in the Soul Wars lobby area.
Just west of the entrance to the Black Knight's Fortress
Near the incandescent wisps south of the poison waste - north west of the crater, on the shore of the waste

text.en: Return to the start point of the miniquest, and talk to the Sinister figure.
text.es: Regresa al punto de inicio de la minimisión y habla con la Sinister figure.
